details.test: Task 1: Order 6 stainless 2x2x6 tubes under $80 each
Task 2: Request laser-cut steel plate quote
Task 3: Buy cheapest suitable product (adapted handrail kit flow)
Task 4: Schedule factory tour for 4 people
Task 5: Save product and datasheet to wishlist (adapted from HEA 200 beam)
Task 6: Configure cabinet and add 2 units to cart
Task 7: Submit emergency repair request (Midwest, within 24 hours)
Task 8: Mixed order with cheapest shipping within 5 days
